text:
Ok, that might be true, but:
(A) What makes you think that a Hollywood career should be Kate's ultimate goal ? If she's happy with what she has been doing so far on YouTube, why would she want to change everything and do something different ?
(B) Life isn't over at 30. There's always a chance for talented people to become famous at a later time, at almost any age. Being young, "fresh" and attractive just isn't everything.

She's not 17 any more... she knows what she's doing :-)

text:
She is long in the tooth already. (and that isn't a comment on her British dentition)

Physical beauty is fleeting. She'll probably be fine sub-30. I don't know how old she is, but I would guess early 20's, or mid-20's. So she doesn't have a lot of time left.

If you're over 20 in Hollywood these daze, you are NOT "young". And you have to take into account the length of the 'career', and the time building up to it, as well, which is why earlier is better.

She should be well on her way by now.
